body:
In section 1H of TCGA 1992 (the main rates of CGT)—
omit subsection (1A) (which sets out the rates for residential property gains accruing to individuals),
in subsection (3) (which sets out the rates for gains accruing to individuals that are not residential property gains or carried interest gains)—
for “10%” substitute “18%”, and
for “20%” substitute “24%”,
omit subsection (4A) (which sets out the rates for residential property gains accruing to personal representatives),
in subsection (6) (which sets out the rates for gains accruing to personal representatives that are not residential property gains or carried interest gains), for “20%” substitute “24%”,
omit subsection (7) (which sets out the rates for residential property gains accruing to trustees), and
in subsection (8) (which sets out the rates for gains accruing to trustees that are not residential property gains or carried interest gains)—
omit “Other”, and
for “20%” substitute “24%”.
Schedule 1 contains amendments in consequence of the provision made by this section.
The amendments made by this section and that Schedule have effect in relation to disposals made on or after 30 October 2024.
heading: Section 7
